title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Apollo Pharmacy

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Apollo Pharmacy
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Apollo Pharmacy in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Apollo Pharmacy:
Apollo Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
